---
title: "LFG: annotations"
bibliography: LFG.bib
#nocite: '@pethes_war_2006'
# tables:
#   - tbl_qa: {file: "qa.qmd", num: 1}
#   - tbl-summary: {file: "results.qmd", num: 2}
title-meta: ""
# date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
date: "2026-05-03"
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

-----

> [LFG](lfg-index.qmd) / annotations

-----
:::

## notes on papers 

### snc
- t12345678
- t12

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}


```{r}
#| label: tbl_qa1
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| eval: true

qa1<-list(LFG=qa$LFG)

```


{{< include _vars.qmd >}}
